Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Off Calendar

Renotice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-01-2015 Advanced From Sep-24-15 To Sep-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Renotice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Emily Lowther, Esq. of Zacks & Freedman, (415-956-8100), for 2331-2332-2335 Jones Street HOA, Petitioner and moving party.
No other appearance.

Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's Motion to Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment are signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Continued To Sep-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER 2331-2333-2335 JONES STREET HOA's Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is continued to September 24, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the Petition (referenced in and relied upon in the points and authorities) no later than September 4, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
